title: PAU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional I Posts
description: The Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Young Professional I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech and M.E./M. Tech can apply for the PAU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, ...
